name: Easy Chocolate Terrine
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Pkg whipped topping, thawed (about 4-3/4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease an 8x4-inch loaf pan and line the bottom and sides with waxed paper.
2. Melt chocolate with water in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly until melted.
3. Cool the mixture slightly.
4. Beat cream cheese and sugar together until smooth.
5. Add vanilla and the cooled chocolate mixture to the cream cheese batter.
6. Fold in 3 cups of the whipped topping.
7. Stir in milk.
8. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and chill until firm, about 4 hours.
9. Unmold the terrine and remove the waxed paper.
10. Add liqueur to the remaining whipped topping.
11. Cut the terrine into slices and serve with the topping mixture.
